# FastStrap - LLM Context

FastStrap is a Python component library for FastHTML that provides 93 UI components (from `faststrap.components`) plus layouts, accessibility helpers, presets, SEO helpers, and PWA tooling.

## Overview

- Version: VCS-derived at runtime (see `faststrap.__version__`)
- License: MIT
- Python: 3.10+
- Dependency: python-fasthtml>=0.6.0

## Bootstrap Setup

```python
from fasthtml.common import FastHTML
from faststrap import add_bootstrap

app = FastHTML()
add_bootstrap(app)  # Adds Bootstrap 5.3 CSS/JS + Bootstrap Icons
```

## Themes

Built-in themes (use with `add_bootstrap(app, theme=...)`):
- green-nature
- blue-ocean
- purple-magic
- red-alert
- orange-sunset
- teal-oasis
- indigo-night
- pink-love
- cyan-sky
- gray-mist

Theme modes: `mode="light" | "dark" | "auto"`.

## Component Catalog (93 total)

### Forms (20)
Button, ButtonGroup, ButtonToolbar, Checkbox, CloseButton, FileInput, FloatingLabel, Form, FormGroup, FormGroupFromErrors, Input, InputGroup, InputGroupText, Radio, Range, SearchableSelect, Select, Switch, ThemeToggle, ToggleGroup

### Display (17)
Badge, Card, Carousel, CarouselItem, EmptyState, Figure, Image, MapView, Markdown, Sheet, StatCard, Table, THead, TBody, TRow, TCell, TextClamp

### Feedback (23)
Alert, ConfirmDialog, ErrorDialog, ErrorPage, ErrorToast, InfoToast, InstallPrompt, Modal, NoticeAlert, NoticeToast, Placeholder, PlaceholderButton, PlaceholderCard, Popover, Progress, ProgressBar, SimpleToast, Spinner, SuccessToast, Toast, ToastContainer, Tooltip, WarningToast

### Navigation (21)
Accordion, AccordionItem, BottomNav, BottomNavItem, Breadcrumb, Collapse, Drawer, Dropdown, DropdownDivider, DropdownItem, GlassNavbar, GlassNavItem, ListGroup, ListGroupItem, Navbar, Pagination, Scrollspy, SidebarNavbar, SidebarNavItem, TabPane, Tabs

### Layout (4)
Container, Row, Col, Hero

### Patterns (8)
Feature, FeatureGrid, FooterModern, NavbarModern, PricingGroup, PricingTier, Testimonial, TestimonialSection

## Layouts (Composed)
AuthLayout, DashboardLayout, LandingLayout

## Accessibility Helpers
SkipLink, LiveRegion, VisuallyHidden, FocusTrap

## Presets (HTMX helpers, 14)
ActiveSearch, InfiniteScroll, AutoRefresh, LazyLoad, LoadingButton, OptimisticAction, LocationAction, hx_redirect, hx_refresh, hx_trigger, hx_reswap, hx_retarget, toast_response, require_auth

## SEO Helpers
SEO, PageMeta, StructuredData

## PWA
add_pwa, PwaMeta

## Utilities
Icon, Fx, merge_classes, set_component_defaults, reset_component_defaults, resolve_defaults

## Notes

- All components accept `**kwargs` for HTML and HTMX attributes (`hx_*`, `data_*`, `aria_*`).
- `Button(..., href=...)` renders as an anchor automatically.
- Some components require Bootstrap JS for interactivity: Accordion, Collapse, Dropdown, Modal, Offcanvas/Drawer, Popover, Tooltip, Tabs, Toast, Carousel, Scrollspy.
- `Form.from_pydantic(...)` and `Table.from_df(...)` are beta helpers for data bridges.
